text:
code file
BENE_ID BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15 1
CLM_ID CLM_ID Claim ID CHAR 15 2
CLM_TYPE NCH_CLM_TYPE_CD NCH Claim Type Code CHAR 2 3
DEMO_ID_SQNC_NUM DEMO_ID_SQNC_NUM Demonstration sequence number NUM 3 4
DEMO_ID_NUM DEMO_ID_NUM Demonstration number CHAR 2 5
DEMO_INFO_TXT DEMO_INFO_TXT Demo information text CHAR 15 6
1 Number shown on the matrix indicates the sequence of the data field. In 2025, the field for beneficiary sex was removed because it is available in the Master
